sky.f1.uk.title: Wet Weekends: Germany '19
sky.f1.uk.description: The 2019 German Grand Prix from the famous Hockenheimring. Lewis Hamilton starts on pole ahead of Max Verstappen, with Sebastian Vettel back in last place.

sky.f1.uk.title: Wet Weekends: Canada '11
sky.f1.uk.description: A chance to relive the 2011 Canadian Grand Prix. After an earlier collision had all but ruled him out of contention for the chequered flag, Jenson Button would hit back in dramatic fashion.

sky.f1.uk.title: Wet Weekends: Britain '08
sky.f1.uk.description: A chance to relive the 2008 British Grand Prix from Silverstone. McLaren driver Heikki Kovalainen was the fastest in qualifying, securing his very first Formula 1 pole position.

sky.f1.uk.title: Wet Weekends: Belgium '98
sky.f1.uk.description: A chance to relive the 1998 Belgian Grand Prix from the Circuit de Spa-Francorchamps. Mika Hakkinen started on pole ahead of British drivers David Coulthard and Damon Hill.

sky.f1.uk.title: Wet Weekends: Brazil '12
sky.f1.uk.description: A look back at the 2012 Brazilian Grand Prix at the Autodromo Jose Carlos Pace. Sebastian Vettel topped the standings going into this season-ending race.

sky.f1.uk.title: Timeless Triumphs: Pierre Gasly
sky.f1.uk.description: One of motorsport's most iconic races arrives with the Italian Grand Prix, held at the Autodromo Nazionale Monza. Charles Leclerc was the champion at this race last year.

sky.f1.uk.title: Wet Weekends: Spain '96
sky.f1.uk.description: A chance to relive the 1996 Spanish Grand Prix from the Circuit de Catalunya. Williams driver Damon Hill led the drivers' championship after the previous race in Monaco.

sky.f1.uk.title: Wet Weekends: Portugal '85
sky.f1.uk.description: A chance to relive some of Ayrton Senna's most significant and spectacular races. Here is the 1985 Portuguese Grand Prix at the Autodromo do Estoril.

sky.mix.uk.title: NRLW Grand Final Highlights 2025
sky.mix.uk.description: The Stadium Australia hosts its second Grand Final of the day, as the Sydney Roosters and Brisbane Broncos lock horns in the culmination of the NRLW season. (05.10)

sky.mix.uk.title: Women's State of Origins 2025
sky.mix.uk.description: The Maroons and Sky Blues meet in the opening game of the 2025 Women's State of Origins - the NRL's annual three-match series putting state pride at stake. (01.05)

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:M City/L'Pool 13
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive a Premier League classic, as Man City face Liverpool back in 2013. City needed three points to close the gap at the top to Man Utd, while the Reds were chasing a top four spot.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:Man U/L'Pool '95
sky.mix.uk.description: A look back at some classic matches in the Premier League. Here, Man United host Liverpool in October 1995, as Eric Cantona returned from his lengthy suspension in a thrilling 2-2 draw.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:L'Pool/Man U '97
sky.mix.uk.description: A look back at some classic matches in the Premier League. Here, Liverpool meet Manchester United at Anfield in 1997, in a match that had a happy outcome for the Red Devils.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:L'Pool/Man U '01
sky.mix.uk.description: A look back at some classic matches in the Premier League. Here, Liverpool meet Manchester United in 2001, as a Michael Owen brace guided the home side to victory.

sky.mix.uk.title: Saudi Arabian F1 GP Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: It's lights out in Jeddah for the 2025 Saudi Arabian Grand Prix. Reigning world champion Max Verstappen crossed the finish line in P1 last season at the Jeddah Corniche Circuit. (20.04)

sky.mix.uk.title: Miami F1 GP Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: Polesitter Max Verstappen is joined by Lando Norris and Kimi Antonelli heading into turn one, while Lewis Hamilton tries to fight through the field from P12. (04.05)

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 16/17: Burton v Birmingham
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, Burton Albion face Birmingham City in 2016 in the Sky Bet Championship, in what was the sides' first competitive meeting.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 16/17:Birmingham v Aston Villa
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive some classic action from the English Football League. Here, local rivals Birmingham City and Aston Villa clash in the Sky Bet Championship at St Andrew's in October 2016.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 16/17: Wolves v Derby County
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive some classic action from the English Football League. Here, Wolves host Derby County at Molineux in a five-goal thriller back in a Bonfire Night sizzler in 2016.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 16/17: N. Forest v Newcastle
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive some classic action from the English Football League. Here, Nottingham Forest take on Newcastle United at the City Ground in a game that saw two red cards and two penalties.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: In their first ever match in what would become a trophy-laden rivalry, Roger Federer - the then world number one - encountered Rafael Nadal in the third round of the 2004 Miami Open.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: In the match that resulted in Serena Williams' 14-year boycott of Indian Wells, the 19-year-old fought Kim Clijsters in front of a volatile crowd - ultimately clinching her second title.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 16/17: Leeds Utd v Aston Villa
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, Leeds United face Aston Villa in the Sky Bet Championship, with the sides meeting in the league for the first time since 2004.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 16/17: Huddersfield v Leeds
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, a West Yorkshire derby as Huddersfield Town play Leeds United in 2017 in the Sky Bet Championship.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 16/17: Sheff Weds v Newcastle
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, Sheffield Wednesday take on Newcastle United in 2017 in the Sky Bet Championship, with both sides looking for promotion chances.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 16/17: Fulham v Aston Villa
sky.mix.uk.description: Remember some classic matches from English football. In this episode, Fulham looked to maintain their playoff hopes against Aston Villa in the Sky Bet Championship in April 2017.

sky.mix.uk.title: NRLW Grand Final Highlights 2025
sky.mix.uk.description: The Stadium Australia hosts its second Grand Final of the day, as the Sydney Roosters and Brisbane Broncos lock horns in the culmination of the NRLW season. (05.10)

Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Twins Daisy and Poppy borrow a magic wand, escape from the castle and turn the whole kingdom into rabbits, frogs and birds. (S1 Ep5)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Peppa Pig
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Daddy Pig reads Peppa and George a bedtime story. Later George wakes up again, so Peppa has to make up another story. (S4 Ep17)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Odo
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Just before the holidays, Pigeon Post seems uncharacteristically glum. Odo and Doodle set about trying to figure out why and help Pigeon Post back to being cheerful once again. (S2 Ep20)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Milkshake! Love Nature Young Voices
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Two friends visit local wetland, learning how to make fat balls to feed birds, then watch a fabulous starling murmuration as thousands of birds dance across the sky. (S1 Ep5/10)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: PAWsome Puzzles
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Help the PAW Patrol solve games, puzzles, and brainteasers in these mini-missions. (Ep10)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Milkshake! Story Den
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Kiera reads a story in which Grandpa takes the grandchildren on an imaginative journey of his pirating days adventuring on the high seas as treasure maps and ships come to life. (S4 Ep18)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Jeremy Vine
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Start the day with a dose of hard-hitting debate, your phone calls and a little fun - all driven by Jeremy's unique style.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Storm & Alexis
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Two of 5's much-loved faces team up to focus on the issues that matter most to viewers - with your opinions front and centre.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: National and international news.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Matt Allwright
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Matt looks at the big news stories developing during the day and offers help and advice to save you money and make your lives a little easier.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Vanessa
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip!

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: The Madame Blanc Mysteries
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: After an antiques TV show presenter dies in mysterious circumstances, Jean is determined to clear the name of her old friend David who becomes implicated in her murder. (S4 Ep5/6)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Kaye and Graham gamble on half-price breakfasts to revive their bar, Val marks her first anniversary with Richard, and Jojo reflects on her Brit-food delivery venture. (S14 Ep57)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: 5 News at 5
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Love Nature
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Eryri National Park in North Wales has been designated one of only a handful of International Dark Sky Reserves on earth. As one world sleeps, another awakens. (Ep5)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: The Motorway
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: On the M5 near Birmingham, Patrollers Dave and Martyn shut down the motorway when a car on fire gets dangerously out of control and is discovered to be packed with explosive contents. (S3 Ep5)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Jewels of the Mediterranean
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Exploring Hvar, the sunniest island in Croatia, from secluded bays with beautiful beaches to glamorous hangouts. Plus, a look at how Hvar became the birthplace of organised tourism in Europe.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Jane McDonald: From Pole to Pole
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Jane reaches her final destination, in the Arctic Circle, where she kayaks in icy fjords, encounters polar bears and walruses, and visits an extraordinary glacier. (Ep6/6)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: The 1970s: Those Were the Days
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: An affectionate look at living through the early 1970s in Britain: the news stories, fads, fashions, music and new 'must have' items - everything from home brewing to glam rock! (Ep1/2)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Sex Dolls & Rubber Lovers: Our Secret World
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Looking at the fetish for rubber - where participants can alter their personas and change their identities - including an online fetish superstar and a dominatrix.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Piers Morgan Uncensored: The Epstein Fallout
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: The bold, opinion-led news and debate show hosted by Piers Morgan. Piers blends journalism, debates and cultural commentary that's unapologetically direct. (S2 Ep3)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: PlayOJO Live Casino Show
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Red or black? Odds or evens? Whichever way you play, get that OJO feeling with two hours of exciting live roulette every single night! Take us for a spin and feel the fun at playojo.com.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Friends
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Joey gets an acting opportunity on Days of our Lives, Rachel dates a guy called Russ, and Monica renews her relationship with Fun Bobby, but finds he is only fun when he's drinking. (S2 Ep10)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Friends
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Rachel's free-spirited mother visits and reveals that she wants to end her marriage and experiment sexually. Carol and Susan prepare for their wedding, with 'help' from Ross. (S2 Ep11)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Ice Age: A Frozen World
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: The series concludes in epic fashion, as Steve Backshall and Michaela Strachan reveal how the Great Thaw triggered the end of the Ice Age and changed the world as we know it. (Ep3/3)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: **Visually Signed**The Highland Vet
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Observational documentary series following vets in Thurso and Wick. It's evening in Thurso when vet David is called out to an emergency at the practice. (S2 Ep3)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Entertainment News on 5
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: **Visually Signed** The Adventures of Paddington
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Judy does not like violin lessons so hides from Ms Potts. Paddington takes up the challenge instead. (VS)  (S1 Ep14)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: **Visually Signed** Milo
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Milo, Lofty and Lark try to stay calm in the face of danger and work as a team to answer distress calls despite the excitement of flying a helicopter. (BSL) (S1 Ep36)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Mixmups
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: The Mixmups mix up a Rock Star adventure to be in a band, but when Spin gets stage fright, will they find another way to help Spin perform? (Ep22)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Heroic Hounds
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Travel across the UK with the PAW Patrol, meeting real-life heroic hounds - from medical detection pups to mountain rescue dogs. These pups make a real difference to peoples' lives! (S1 Ep1/10)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Peppa Pig
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Miss Rabbit has hurt her ankle, so her sister and her friends offer to fill in for her at the ice cream stand. (S3 Ep37)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Peppa Pig
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Santa's Grotto: Peppa and George pay a visit to Father Christmas. Peppa asks for a very special doll as a present, but will Santa be able to deliver it to her? (S3 Ep38)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Nanny Plum conjures up a hamster called Pippin for the twins. However, the naughty new pet is soon causing chaos in the castle. (S1 Ep42)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Thomas & Friends: All Engines Go!
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Thomas offers to help Gordon make an important delivery, but Gordon keeps questioning Thomas' every move.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Fireman Sam
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: While on the way to the ruins, Trevor's bus breaks down. Trevor tries fixing it but he disconnects the brakes, and when Mrs Chen helps out she ends up driving the bus out of control. (S10 Ep6)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Tim Rex in Space
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Join Tim Rex, brother Tommy, sister Tia, and Triceratops bestie Kai as they tackle kid-shaped problems with dino-sized solutions! Tim, Tommy, Tia and Dad get stuck on a remote asteroid. (S1 Ep1)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Peppa Pig
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Peppa and her family camp overnight in a tent and wake to find that the whole festival is covered in mud. Peppa is delighted! (S6 Ep15)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Peppa Pig
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Granny and Grandpa Pig decide to go and pick their own strawberries at Miss Rabbit's strawberry farm. (S6 Ep16)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Pip and Posy
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: When Pip becomes obsessed with his 'get well soon' card for Posy, she shows him that just being able to spend time with him is the very best gift of all. (S2 Ep42)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: The Woohoos!
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: The Woohoos hear Gorilla Woohoo singing but when they ask him to do it again he can't. Together they work out that Gorillas sing when they eat - and burp when they're happy! (S1 Ep41)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: The Adventures of Paddington
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: The kids form a rock band with Paddington, but what instrument should he play? (S1 Ep35)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: PAW Patrol
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Adventure Bay is getting a Fire Station! When disaster strikes during the opening day barbecue, it's up to the PAW Patrol to put it out. (S11 Ep32)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Animal Care Club
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: The Cadets spend the day at Harper Asprey Wildlife Sanctuary, where they help care for a rescued bat, look after a badger named Pedro, and lend a hand with a rescued jackdaw. (S2 Ep9)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: The Smurfs
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: When Clumsy decides to be an acrobat, the Smurfs pretend to be a travelling circus to help him realise his dream. (S2 Ep40)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: SpongeBob SquarePants
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: SpongeBob and Patrick go to see the latest horror film, only to seemingly be stalked by the villain. (S9 Ep42)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Entertainment News on 5
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Ben tries out a different kind of wild living - 'continuous cruising' on a narrowboat - staying with Dave, whose move off-grid on canals became a lifeline after a tragedy. (S21 Ep4)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Tales from the Riverbank
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Clare Balding travels The Thames, meeting creatures along its banks, discovering landscapes that inspired The Wind in the Willows, and the splendour of Cliveden estate and Windsor Castle. (Ep3)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Tales from the Riverbank
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Clare Balding visits the Yorkshire Dales to explore the River Wharfe, discovering the nature en route and beautiful Bolton Abbey, before a spot of fishing and a serenade from a brass band. (Ep4)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Three generations of the same family are trying to live in harmony, but two dogs at war are disturbing the peace. Will Graeme be able to get these arch-enemies to call a truce? (S3 Ep 2)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Master dog trainer Graeme Hall finds long-lasting solutions for a host of scene-stealing canines. Graeme tries to fix the broken bond between cairn terrier Ted and his owner Mike. (S3 Ep 3)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Catching Up with the...
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: ...Royals with Rev Richard Coles. Richard and Emily Andrews deep dive into the royals' relationship with the press - from who really controls the narrative to the dynamic. (S1 Ep2)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Our Yorkshire Farm
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Following a farm in the Yorkshire Dales. It is the beginning of autumn and the Owen family are preparing for one of the most intense periods of the year - the breeding season. (S3 Ep2)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Our Yorkshire Farm
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: It is the beginning of autumn and the Owen family are preparing for one of the most intense periods of the year - the breeding season. (S3 Ep3)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Our Yorkshire Farm
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Inspired by the discovery that the farm is over 700 years old, the kids search an old barn for signs of life left behind by previous families. (S3 Ep4)

Channel5Plus1.uk.description: National and international news.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Royal Residences: A Map of Britain
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: A revealing look inside King Charles's staggering multi-billion-pound property portfolio of spectacular castles, palaces and farmhouses, stretching across the UK and beyond.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Secrets of the Royal Traditions
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: We explore the surprising origins of the New Year's and Birthday Honours, how royals contribute - and recover - from scandals, and the defunct role of the royal jester. (S2 Ep3)

Channel5Plus1.uk.description: The story of style icon the Princess of Wales told through ten of her most famous dresses, including her much-copied sapphire blue engagement garment, wedding dress and cloaked Coronation gown.

Channel5Plus1.uk.description: From tabloid hitting break-ups such as Brad Pitt and Jennifer Aniston to the break up of the UK's own Katie Price, this show counts down the bizarre behaviour of celebrity couples.

E4Plus1.uk.description: Sabatiello's: Gordon Ramsay sets his sights on Sabatiello's, an Italian restaurant in Connecticut that's better known for its owner Sammy's tantrums than the food. (S2 Ep3)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Trobiano's: Gordon Ramsay meets struggling executive chef Anthony Trobiano, who's sinking under half a million dollars of debt at his restaurant in Great Neck, New York. (S2 Ep4)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Front: At his high school reunion, Homer wins several awards including 'Most Weight Gained' and 'Most Improved Odour'. But then the Principal finds out he never graduated. (S4 Ep19/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Whacking Day: Lisa asks singer Barry White to help stop the cruel Springfield 'Whacking Day' tradition of hitting snakes with sticks. (S4 Ep20/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Krusty Gets Cancelled: When Krusty's show gets axed, Bart and Lisa enlist Bette Midler, Hugh Hefner, the Red Hot Chili Peppers and Elizabeth Taylor to help him get it back. (S4 Ep22/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Homer's Barbershop Quartet: Homer reminisces about the Be Sharps, the barbershop quartet he was in with Barney, Apu and Principal Skinner. Guest starring George Harrison. (S5 Ep1/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Homer Goes to College: Homer has to go to university to study nuclear physics when it becomes clear that he's unqualified for his job as nuclear power plant safety inspector. (S5 Ep3/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Squirt and the Whale: The Simpsons put up a wind turbine in their back garden. Lisa has an upsetting experience when she attempts to free a beached whale. (S21 Ep19/23)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: To Surveil with Love: When a bomb squad blows up Homer's unattended gym bag, radiation is released into Springfield, and the authorities react by suspending civil liberties. (S21 Ep20/23)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Bob Next Door: Bart becomes convinced that his new neighbour Walt is really his vengeful arch-enemy Sideshow Bob (Kelsey Grammer) in disguise. (S21 Ep22/23)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Moe Letter Blues: Moe writes a letter to Homer, Apu and Reverend Lovejoy, who are on holiday with their children, and threatens to run away with one of their wives... (S21 Ep21/23)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Judge Me Tender: Moe becomes a judge on American Idol. Meanwhile, Homer spends more time at home, and drives Marge to distraction. Simon Cowell and Ellen DeGeneres guest star. (S21 Ep23/23)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Home Alone
E4Plus1.uk.description: (1990) Classic family comedy starring Macaulay Culkin. A boy's parents forget to take him on holiday with them. Then two inept burglars turn up. Can our resourceful young hero outwit them?

E4Plus1.uk.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: Watching 24 Hours in A&E, Mission: Impossible - Fallout, Sky Coppers and The Chase are: Rylan Clark, Jamali Maddix, Katherine Ryan, Martin Kemp, Judi Love, Zoe Ball and Bez. (S5 Ep5)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: It's Asia, Meet the Rees-Moggs and How to Heat Your Home for Less This Winter on Gogglebox this time. Plus: Scam Interceptors, The Last Woodsmen and Subservience.  (S24 Ep13)

Film4.uk.title: Beau Is Afraid
Film4.uk.description: (2023) Joaquin Phoenix stars in Ari Aster's fantastical odyssey about an anxiety-riddled man-boy working his way through a variety of psychological horrors to visit his domineering mother.

Film4.uk.title: Public Enemies
Film4.uk.description: (2009) Michael Mann directs Johnny Depp as infamous bank robber John Dillinger; Marion Cotillard as Dillinger's sorta girl; and Christian Bale as the FBI agent trying to put him away.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Local Hero
Film4.uk.description: (1983) Comedy starring Peter Riegert, Burt Lancaster and Peter Capaldi. A US oil company executive tries to persuade a small Scottish seaside community to sell up their entire village.

Film4.uk.title: Hail the Conquering Hero
Film4.uk.description: (1944) Satirical wartime comedy starring Eddie Bracken as a man who becomes a celebrated war hero despite having been medically discharged from the marines after only a few weeks.

Film4.uk.title: Gun Fury
Film4.uk.description: (1953) Western. Rock Hudson stars as a California-bound settler who must ride 1500 miles to the Mexican border to rescue his fiancée (Donna Reed) after she's abducted by an outlaw.

Film4.uk.title: Jason and the Argonauts
Film4.uk.description: (1963) Classic interpretation of the Greek myth of Jason's quest to find the Golden Fleece, boasting the enduring work of special effects maestro Ray Harryhausen. Directed by Don Chaffey.

Film4.uk.title: Moon
Film4.uk.description: (2009) Psychological sci-fi thriller. Sam Rockwell stars as a man who lives alone on the moon overseeing a mining operation. His time's nearly done, but he's started to go a bit peculiar...

Film4.uk.title: The Pope's Exorcist
Film4.uk.description: (2023) Supernatural horror starring Russell Crowe, loosely based on the memoirs of a 'real' exorcist. A case of demonic possession in Spain connects to dark secrets from the Inquisition.

Film4.uk.title: S.W.A.T.
Film4.uk.description: (2003) Action with Colin Farrell and Samuel L Jackson. A loose canon joins an elite force to escort a fugitive to chokey. But the baddie's put a reward out for help with his escape.

Film4.uk.title: xXx: The Next Level
Film4.uk.description: (2005) Action thriller sequel with Samuel L Jackson, Ice Cube and Willem Dafoe. There's a new Triple X agent in town and he's up against some shady government business.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Destroyer
Film4.uk.description: (1943) Second World War drama about a warship assigned to mail runs but that ends up engaged in battle anyway, starring Edward G Robinson, Glenn Ford and Marguerite Chapman.

Film4.uk.title: The Devil at 4 O'Clock
Film4.uk.description: (1961) Drama. Spencer Tracy stars as an unfairly unpopular priest living on a volcanic South Sea island which is about to erupt. With Kerwin Matthews, Frank Sinatra and Barbara Luna.

Film4.uk.title: Midway
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Roland Emmerich's sprawling, action-packed war drama about the Battle of Midway, a major turning point in World War II. Starring Ed Skrein, Luke Evans and Woody Harrelson.

Film4.uk.title: Hidden Figures
Film4.uk.description: (2016) Taraji P. Henson, Octavia Spencer and Janelle Monáe star in the Oscar-nominated, fact-based drama about three women whose genius made a significant contribution to the space race.

Film4.uk.title: Bohemian Rhapsody
Film4.uk.description: (2018) Rami Malek turns in an Oscar-winning performance as Freddie Mercury in this rollercoaster musical biopic of the late Queen frontman. Big tunes. Big drama. Bigger teeth.

Film4.uk.title: Benedetta
Film4.uk.description: (2021) Paul Verhoeven's historical drama. Sex and the sacred collide as a Renaissance nun begins to have visions of Christ, while also taking a shine to one of her sisters. In French/subs.

Film4.uk.title: In Fear
Film4.uk.description: (2013) Psychological horror with Iain De Caestecker and Alice Englert. A couple get lost in remote rural lanes as they drive to a music festival. Frustration turns to fear as dusk falls...

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Lifeboat
Film4.uk.description: (1944) Alfred Hitchcock's Oscar-nominated Second World War drama starring Tallulah Bankhead, William Bendix and Walter Slezak as three of the survivors from a liner torpedoed by the Nazis.

Film4.uk.title: Monster House
Film4.uk.description: (2006) Spooky animated caper with Maggie Gyllenhaal and Steve Buscemi. A young boy and his babysitter spy on the creepy neighbour. Did he really eat his wife?

Film4.uk.title: Stormbreaker
Film4.uk.description: (2006) Family action-thriller with Alex Pettyfer and Mickey Rourke. British intelligence recruit a schoolboy to take on the man who killed his dad and is planning to unleash a deadly virus.

Film4.uk.title: The Personal History of David...
Film4.uk.description: ...Copperfield: (2019) Armando Iannucci's critically acclaimed comedy-drama reinvention of the classic Charles Dickens novel, starring Dev Patel, Tilda Swinton and Hugh Laurie.

Film4.uk.title: Fisherman's Friends
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Heart-warming comedy based on the real-life story of the Cornish folk ensemble who took the UK charts by storm in 2010, starring Daniel Mays and Tuppence Middleton.

Film4.uk.title: The Other Woman
Film4.uk.description: (2014) Romcom starring Cameron Diaz, Leslie Mann, Kate Upton and Nikolaj Coster-Waldau. Three women take revenge on the man who betrayed their love. Strong language, scenes that may offend.

Film4.uk.title: The Fury
Film4.uk.description: (1978) Brian De Palma's supernatural horror with Kirk Douglas, John Cassavetes, Andrew Stevens and Amy Irving. A shadowy agency abducts a young man with telekinetic powers.

GBNews.uk.title: Patrick Christys Tonight
GBNews.uk.description: Join Patrick for two hours of spirited debate and news making interviews. Top guests tackle the issues that matter, with a sharp take on every story.

GBNews.uk.title: Patrick Christys Tonight Late...
GBNews.uk.description: Edition. Tomorrow's news, tonight. All the major stories making the front pages and full coverage of all the breaking news at home and abroad with Patrick Christys.

GBNews.uk.title: The Late Show Live
GBNews.uk.description: Live from Washington DC, Bev Turner and Ben Leo bring you the latest from the US and what it means for Britain.

GBNews.uk.title: Farage
GBNews.uk.description: Nigel Farage doesn't hold back in his GB News prime-time show. Hear his views and give your own in an hour of discussion and debate. Join Nigel as he takes on the big stories other media won't touch.

UAndW.uk.title: Elementary
UAndW.uk.description: New. M: Sherlock is unnerved to discover that a British criminal who knows about his past has followed him to New York, but is unsure of his agenda. S1 Ep12

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux: Behind Bars
UAndW.uk.description: Louis spends two weeks in California's notorious San Quentin State Prison, meeting some long-term inmates and getting to grips with their intriguing inner culture.

UAndW.uk.title: Inside the Ambulance
UAndW.uk.description: Today in Stoke, newly-wed paramedics Mick and Rachel help a young man who has hurt his back. In Dudley, paramedics help a 74-year-old who had a shock from his internal defibrillator. S13 Ep4

UAndW.uk.title: Tom Daley: Illegal to be Me
UAndW.uk.description: The Olympic diving champion investigates homophobic behaviour around the Commonwealth, travelling to some countries where homosexuality is a crime and even punishable by death.

UAndW.uk.title: The Wheel
UAndW.uk.description: The players face a colossal spinning wheel as they attempt to win a fortune with some help from Greg Rutherford, Nigel Havers, Rev Kate Bottley and Chris Ramsey. S2 Ep2

UAndW.uk.title: Teleshopping
UAndW.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndW.uk.title: MasterChef Australia
UAndW.uk.description: It's an Immunity Pin fracas as a field of faves fan the flames in a flipping flambe free-for-all. Who will face fab French foodie Gabriel Gate in a fierce fight to the finish? S15 Ep19

UAndW.uk.title: Tipping Point
UAndW.uk.description: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning its 10,000 pound jackpot. S10 Ep100

UAndW.uk.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
UAndW.uk.description: Avening: The team helps project manager Ben in Avening in the Cotswolds, whose life was changed in a split second by a freak accident while holidaying in Cyprus. S29 Ep9

UAndW.uk.description: Time for another perfect property transformation from Drew and Jonathan Scott. The Scotts help Aven and Phillip, who are hoping to find a dog-friendly dream home. S4 Ep13

UAndW.uk.description: Grenfell Boxing Club: Nick Knowles and the team are constructing two buildings for the Grenfell community, starting with a new home for the Dale Youth Boxing Club. S29 Ep7

UAndW.uk.title: My Kitchen Rules New Zealand
UAndW.uk.description: It's the semi-final, and two teams compete in a sudden death cook-off. Their task is to cook a 3-course dinner to impress a table of Kiwi comedians - and it's no laughing matter. S5 Ep9

UAndW.uk.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake
UAndW.uk.description: Crumble's Big Adventure: Pete meets Staffy Boxer Cross Crumble, who's been at the centre in Basildon for over three years, stuck without a foster or permanent home in sight. S3 Ep5

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux: Shooting Joe Exotic
UAndW.uk.description: Louis Theroux heads to America to investigate one of the most controversial and captivating icons of recent times: gun-toting, self-described 'gay hillbilly' and 'Tiger King' Joe Exotic.

UAndW.uk.title: Wagspiracy: Vardy vs Rooney
UAndW.uk.description: Documentary exploring the hidden workings of the tabloids, PRs and agents connected to the 'Wagatha Christie' incident, involving footballers' wives Coleen Rooney and Rebekah Vardy.

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux: Altered States: Take My Baby
UAndW.uk.description: Louis Theroux explores open adoption in California, where women hand over their babies at birth to adoptive families paying tens of thousands of dollars for the privilege.

UAndW.uk.title: Death at the Mansion: Rebecca Zahau
UAndW.uk.description: Two Deaths, One Mansion: Experts take a closer look at who Rebecca was as they try to figure out whether the crime scene was staged to look like a suicide. S1 Ep2

UAndW.uk.description: Three contestants try to answer their way to a life-changing jackpot, with help from Sue Perkins, Robert Peston, Steph McGovern and David Dickinson. S2 Ep3

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Flipping Bangers
UAndYesterday.uk.description: BMW Z3: Will and Gus want to buy a BMW, and Will says he likes the 'feminine' Z3. There's a trade-in up the road which might fit the bill, but it's a high price. S2 Ep2

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Flipping Bangers
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Austin Maestro: Gus and Will go for the once-maligned Austin Maestro. The car they want to buy has already been sold but the seller has another - his own - on the driveway. Can they do a deal? S2 Ep3

UAndYesterday.uk.description: Georgia and Azerbaijan: Joanna Lumley follows the Silk Road from the Black Sea to the Caspian Sea, travelling across the post-Soviet states of Georgia and Azerbaijan. S1 Ep2

UAndYesterday.uk.description: Wolverhampton to Anglesey Basin: It's Robbie's toughest trip yet as he battles through water weed on the Bradley Arm and gets stuck in silt on the Ridgacre Branch. S5 Ep5

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Canal Boat Diaries
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Great Barr to Atherstone: Robbie Cumming encounters a leaky lock pound on the Perry Barr Flight and gets marooned in the mud before travelling under Spaghetti Junction in Birmingham. S5 Ep6

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Mediterranean with Simon Reeve

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Mediterranean with Simon Reeve
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Setting off from a snowy mountain ski resort in Cyprus, Simon Reeve finds an island and a capital city still deeply divided between Turkish Cypriots and Greek Cypriots. S1 Ep2

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Mediterranean with Simon Reeve
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Simon Reeve embarks on the third leg of his four-part journey around the Mediterranean, travelling through Libya, Tunisia and across the sea to Sicily. S1 Ep3

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Classic Car Kings
UAndYesterday.uk.description: VW Type 1 Beetle: Big Irv has had a life-long love affair with VWs, so he's extremely surprised when he's offered the chance to work on a very early 1949 Beetle. S1 Ep1

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Aston Martin DB6/Toyota Supra: Derek's in Bromsgrove on the trail of a rare mark 2 Aston Martin DB6. Plus, Jack and Charlie collect an even rarer Toyota Celica Supra in Cheshire. S13 Ep1

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Project X / Beach Cruiser: The team buy one of Derek's favourite Austin commercials and convert it to electric, and also snap up a super-rare 50's American beach bike. S6 Ep1

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Swift/Toyota Corona/Bedford Van: Derek goes to pick up a veteran 1904 Swift, there's an emotional farewell to a 1980s Bedford HA van, and a Toyota Corona finds a new home. S9 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Austin Healey: Up for auction this week is a 1980 Ford Escort, a hand-built 1946 Bedford 12 electric car, and a beautiful, red 1957 Austin Healey. S7 Ep7

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Triumph TR4A: Derek collects a beautifully restored and carefully modified 1936 Wolseley 14/56. Meanwhile, a Batman-inspired Chrysler Crossfire is dropped off at the Thornton le Dale garage. S7 Ep8

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Abandoned Engineering
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: The Human Zoo: An impressive compound commandeered and repurposed by a brutal regime and an eerie complex off the coast of Ireland that became the biggest of its kind. S6 Ep10

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Abandoned Engineering
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Hollywood Heroes: Legendary film sets with surprising pasts and real locations that inspired Hollywood. Within these decaying structures are the echoes of history. S7 Ep1

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Masters of Reinvention
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Luton Minor Model Plane and Armchair Drafting Table: Dr Shini and her dream team design and build a scale replica of an iconic vintage aeroplane, as well as an armchair drafting table. S1 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Teleshopping
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: The Black Forest to Hannover: Michael Portillo goes deep into the Black Forest, and he discovers how Germany's reputation for making quality goods was established. S4 Ep5

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Ford RS2000/Austin Healey Sprite: There is a triple collection of desirable cars in store for Derek when an MG Midget, an Austin-Healey 'frogeye' Sprite and an RS2000 come up for auction. S3 Ep9

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Bentley T1/Fiesta XR2: Dave's son Jack is heading out to Cheshire to collect two cars with a 35-year age difference. And luckily for Mathewsons, Lucy knows exactly what has been brought in. S3 Ep10
